# Eurobase

> EU-sovereign Backend-as-a-Service platform. European alternative to Firebase and Supabase.

Eurobase provides authentication, managed PostgreSQL, object storage, realtime subscriptions, edge functions, encrypted vault, cron jobs, webhooks, CLI, and audit logging — all on 100% EU infrastructure (Scaleway, France). No CLOUD Act exposure. GDPR-native by design.

## Quick Facts

- Website: https://eurobase.app
- Console: https://console.eurobase.app
- Docs: https://docs.eurobase.app
- Status: Beta (early access May 2026)
- Infrastructure: Scaleway, Paris, France (EU-owned)
- SDK: @eurobase/sdk (TypeScript/JavaScript, zero dependencies)
- CLI: @eurobase/cli (30+ commands)

## Core Features

1. Authentication — Email/password, magic links, OAuth (Google, GitHub, LinkedIn, Apple, Microsoft), phone SMS OTP. JWT sessions with refresh tokens.
2. Managed PostgreSQL — REST API, SQL editor, row-level security with presets, schema management, full-text search. PostgREST-style query params.
3. Object Storage — S3-compatible. Upload, download, list, delete, signed URLs. Supports File, Blob, ArrayBuffer, Uint8Array, Buffer.
4. Realtime — WebSocket subscriptions for INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE events on tables. Auto-reconnect with exponential backoff.
5. Edge Functions — Serverless TypeScript/JavaScript (Deno runtime). DB triggers, scheduling, versioning, environment variables.
6. Vault — AES-256-GCM encrypted key-value store. Requires secret API key (eb_sk_*).
7. Cron Jobs — Schedule SQL queries and RPC calls with execution logs.
8. Webhooks — Event-driven HTTP delivery with retry logic and HMAC signing.
9. CLI — 30+ commands: projects, database, storage, vault, functions, migrations.
10. Audit & Compliance — GDPR export, DPA reports, sub-processor registry, full action logging.

## SDK Quickstart

```typescript
import { createClient } from '@eurobase/sdk'

const euro = createClient({
  url: 'https://my-app.eurobase.app',
  apiKey: 'eb_pk_...',
})

// Or use connection string:
// const euro = createClient('eurobase://eb_pk_xxx@my-app.eurobase.app')

// Auth
await euro.auth.signUp({ email: 'user@example.com', password: 'secret' })
await euro.auth.signIn({ email: 'user@example.com', password: 'secret' })
euro.auth.signInWithOAuth('google')

// Database (fluent query builder)
const { data } = await euro.db.from('todos').select('id', 'title').eq('done', 'false').order('created_at', { ascending: false }).limit(20)

// Insert / Update / Delete
await euro.db.from('todos').insert({ title: 'Buy milk' })
await euro.db.from('todos').update('uuid', { done: true })
await euro.db.from('todos').delete('uuid')

// Schema DDL (requires secret key eb_sk_*)
await euro.db.schema.createTable('posts', {
  columns: [
    { name: 'id', type: 'uuid', primary_key: true, default_value: 'gen_random_uuid()' },
    { name: 'title', type: 'text' },
    { name: 'user_id', type: 'uuid' },
  ],
})

// Storage
await euro.storage.upload('avatars/me.png', file)
const { objects } = await euro.storage.list({ prefix: 'avatars/' })
const { url } = await euro.storage.createSignedUrl('avatars/me.png', 'download')

// Realtime
euro.realtime.on('orders', 'INSERT', (event) => console.log(event))

// Vault (secret key only)
await euro.vault.set('STRIPE_KEY', 'sk_live_...')
const { data: key } = await euro.vault.get('STRIPE_KEY')

// Edge Functions
const { data: result } = await euro.functions.invoke('process-order', { body: { orderId: '123' } })

// Health check
const { ok, latency_ms } = await euro.status()
```

## Pricing

- Free: 500 MB database, 1 GB storage, 5 GB bandwidth, 10K MAU, 2 projects, 3 functions, 3 webhooks
- Pro: 5 GB database, 50 GB storage, 100 GB bandwidth, 100K MAU, 10 projects, 25 functions, unlimited webhooks
- Enterprise: Custom limits, dedicated infrastructure, SLA

## Links

- Full API reference: https://eurobase.app/llms-full.txt
- GitHub: https://github.com/eurobase
- Contact: founders@eurobase.app
